L2().details: Sets up the L2 contracts. Depends on `L1()` being called first.

disableUpgradedFork().details: Disables upgrade mode for testing. By default the fork testing env will be upgraded to the latest      implementation. This can be used to disable the upgrade which, is useful for tests targeting the upgrade      process itself.

enableAltDA().details: Enables alternative data availability mode for testing

skipIfOpsRepoTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network using the superchain ops repo.
